title: Glowing Blocks
description: make blocks glow in the dark places
body:
A resource pack that makes wide variety of blocks glow in the dark.


![block comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27328db1a039a0930c1412d99f28b960177c4e7b.png)


### how to install resource pack
Inside the game goto "Options", "Resource Packs", and then "Open Pack folder". Once there move the Glowing Blocks zip file inside the folder.
